title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries. The incident occurred Monday morning and is under investigation by the NC State Bureau of Investigation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on local communities, raising concerns about public safety.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14, 2026, at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC. The workshop will feature classroom sessions and demonstrations.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte as a hub for advanced manufacturing and provides opportunities for professional development.

title: Trump Teases Release of New UFO Files
summary: Former President Trump hints at releasing new UFO records, stating they will be "very interesting." He directed the Pentagon to share documents related to UFOs and extraterrestrial life.
charlotte_impact: Continues the ongoing public interest in UFOs and government transparency regarding potential extraterrestrial encounters.

title: Russia Declares Truce in Ukraine for Victory Day
summary: Russia's Defense Ministry announced a unilateral ceasefire in Ukraine to commemorate Victory Day. The ceasefire is scheduled for Friday and Saturday.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the ongoing conflict in Ukraine and the significance of Victory Day in Russian culture and politics.

title: Southern States Consider Redistricting After Voting Rights Act Ruling
summary: Lawmakers in several southern states are meeting to consider redistricting plans following a Supreme Court ruling that weakened the Voting Rights Act. Alabama's governor called a special session.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about voting rights and potential gerrymandering in southern states.

title: Mac Tabby Cat Cafe Celebrates 5th Anniversary
summary: Mac Tabby Cat Cafe celebrated its 5th Anniversary. The local cafe is a popular spot for cat lovers in the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a successful local business and its contribution to the community's unique culture.

title: McDonald's USA Introduces New Summer Drinks
summary: McDonald's is launching new McCafe drinks for the summer. Mashoor Awad, a local franchise owner, revealed the new offerings available across the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local business initiatives and new product offerings from a major fast-food chain.

title: Sweet Lew’s BBQ Featured in Rising Kitchen
summary: Sweet Lew's BBQ was featured in the Rising kitchen, showcasing their take on a Turkey BLT using Duke's Mayo.
charlotte_impact: Promotes local culinary talent and highlights unique food offerings in the Charlotte area.

title: Sheriff's Office Seeks Help Identifying Vehicle in Cemetery Hit and Run
summary: The Chesterfield County Sheriff's Office is asking for the public's help in identifying a vehicle involved in a hit and run that damaged church property.
charlotte_impact: Addresses property damage and the importance of community cooperation in solving local crimes.

title: Longtime Yankees Broadcaster John Sterling Dies at 87
summary: John Sterling, the iconic radio broadcaster for the New York Yankees, passed away on Monday at the age of 87. He was known for his unique home run calls.
charlotte_impact: Marks the passing of a well-known sports figure and his impact on baseball broadcasting.

title: Rudy Giuliani Hospitalized with Pneumonia
summary: Former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani is hospitalized with pneumonia and is in critical but stable condition. He is breathing on his own after being on a ventilator.
charlotte_impact: Reports on the health status of a prominent political figure and his ongoing medical treatment.

title: Spirit Airlines Announces Shutdown of Operations
summary: Spirit Airlines has canceled all upcoming flights and ceased customer service operations, indicating a complete shutdown.
charlotte_impact: Significantly impacts travelers and the airline industry, raising concerns about competition and consumer options.

title: Suspect Killed on I-77 After Stolen Vehicle Incident
summary: A suspect was killed on I-77 after a stolen vehicle incident that began on Old Pineville Road. Police spotted the stolen car just after 10 p.m.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of car theft and police pursuit, highlighting the risks involved in criminal activity.
